missions.name: Construction Supplies
missions.description: Cloud City is always expanding. They'll take whatever ore you can bring.

missions.name: Shielded Platform Reinforcement
missions.description: New residential sectors need magnetite for radiation-shielded support frames. Purity matters — Cloud City inspectors reject mixed loads.

missions.name: Executive Suites
missions.description: Premium iron-nickel fittings for the new orbital penthouse tier. Discreet delivery, excellent pay.
